osm_investigation.objective: Check if Water Infrastructure tags exist in OpenStreetMap within the study area
osm_investigation.result: All OSM water infrastructure queries returned no features (0 counts) or service errors
osm_investigation.conclusion: NO OSM WATER INFRASTRUCTURE DATA FOUND in the study area using verified OSM tags

manual_candidates_investigation.objective: Search verified public sources for water infrastructure in/near the study area

verified_sources.name: Karnataka Water Supply and Drainage Board (KWSDB)

infrastructure.name: Karnataka Power Grid Substations with Water Systems

manual_candidates_investigation.study_area_proximity: All identified sites are within 30-70km of the study area
manual_candidates_investigation.verifiable_data: Infrastructure details confirmed through government reports, official announcements, and utility documentation

recommendations: Manual water infrastructure dataset is required as no OSM data exists
Recommended to start with KWSDB water supply schemes as primary manual entries
Government infrastructure projects should be prioritized over industrial sites
All manual entries require on-site verification and official documentation
summary.next_steps: Awaiting approval to proceed with Phase 3.8.2 implementation after manual dataset verification
